rationale.R1.1: The protocol does not deliver the promised 'fine-grained, skill-resolved profile' as it computes a single scalar aggregate E over all problems.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (aggregated results instead of per-axis breakdowns).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (unsupported claims and lack of evidence for the contribution claim).
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without traceability; major rewrites are not traced.
